name: HERNIATION PIT
definition: SYNOVIAL HERNIATION PIT = CONVERSION DEFECT ingrowth of fibrous + cartilaginous elements from adjacent joint through perforation in cortex

demographics.Size: usually < 1 cm in diameter; may enlarge over time

discriminating_features: hyperintense area on T2WI (= fluid signal intensity)

general: hyperintense area on T2WI (= fluid signal intensity)
